MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CACH LLC's Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement And Enter Judgment Against Defendants is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Written order and judgment are signed and filed in open court.
